notes: This pass avoids generic invented data.
Each model carries only manual-backed/platform-backed references found in official Midea documents or trusted manual repositories.
Exact board serials are intentionally left as 'unknown' unless directly confirmed by model sticker or board label.
Platform-level wiring/PCB references are attached where exact-model public service PDFs were not openly available.

service_identity.platform_family: Midea MF200 family / verified platform mapping
service_identity.notes: Verified Mode: only sourced faults and service references included; board ordering still requires full appliance sticker and PCB label.

faults.title: Water inlet overtime
faults.description: Water level does not change during filling period
faults.cause: Tap closed, low pressure, clogged hose/filter, valve fault

faults.title: Overflow
faults.cause: Inlet valve leakage, pressure system or level sensor issue
checks: Check for water entering without power

faults.title: Water level sensor connection fault
faults.cause: Sensor wiring/open circuit/connector issue

faults.title: Drain timeout
faults.description: Water not drained within allowed time
faults.cause: Drain pump obstruction, hose blockage, or pump failure
checks: Check pump supply and PCB output

faults.title: Door lock fault
faults.cause: Door lock assembly, latch, harness, or PCB drive issue

faults.title: Door unlock fault
faults.cause: Door lock release issue or control-side fault

faults.title: Water level sensor abnormal
faults.description: Pressure/level sensing out of expected range
faults.cause: Sensor, air chamber, air hose, or PCB input issue

faults.title: Temperature sensing abnormal
faults.description: Temperature feedback out of expected range
faults.cause: NTC sensor open/short or wiring issue

faults.title: Motor inverter PCB error
faults.cause: Inverter PCB, motor harness, or motor-drive issue

faults.title: Heating fault
faults.cause: Heater, NTC, relay, harness, or PCB issue

faults.title: Heating timeout / heating abnormal
faults.description: Temperature does not rise as expected
faults.cause: Weak heater, NTC drift, or PCB issue
